calendar.matters:
Joinder In Petitioners Motion To Compel The City And County Of San Francisco Department Of Aging And Adult Services To Comply With Deposition Subpoena For Personal Appearance And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Nov-06-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David H. Lawton, Esq., The Gallagher Law Group, P.C., Telephone (310) 203-2600, appearing for Petitioner JBR Enterprises, LLC.;
David K. Ries, Esq., Deputy City Attorney CCSF, Telephone (415) 554-4212, appearing for Third Party Witness Adult Protection Services;
Donna L. Quan, Esq., Miachael B. Bassi a Law Corporation, Telephone (415) 986-8122, appearing for other, Claire Yeaton-Risley;
Sheila Pham, CSR# 13293, Telephone (415)- 517-5439, Email spham28@yahoo.com;

Parties meet and confered outside the courtroom prior to the start of todays hearing.

The matter is A R G U E D. The Court makes the following ruling:

OTHER CLAIRE YEATON-RISLEY Joinder In Petitioners Motion To Compel The City And County Of San Francisco Department Of Aging And Adult Services To Comply With Deposition Subpoena For Personal Appearance And Production Of Documents

GRANTED. Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: William Trupek; Court Reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR# 13293(302/JPT)
